name: quality-evaluation-suite
description: Detachable quality evaluation suite for auditing reusable PM skills, project preference leakage, and skill generalization risk.

interface.shortDescription: Audits reusable PM skills for generalization and leakage risk.
interface.longDescription: A detachable suite for checking whether PM Copilot skills remain reusable, avoid project-specific leakage, and keep user or project preferences separate from generic skill behavior.
defaultPrompt: Audit these skill updates for project-specific leakage.
Check whether this lesson belongs in a project cache or a generic skill.
Review the PRD skill suite against the evaluation cases.
